---
title: "Resources"
author: "Gary Newport"
description: ""
id: posts
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents: "posts/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../../html/Journal/listing.ejs
    categories: false
page-layout: full

toc-location: right
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
code-tools: false
comments: false
engine: knitr
freeze: false
---
 
```{css, echo=FALSE}
#title-block-header .description {
    display: none;
}
```

**Resources on a range of topics I'm interested in and learning about.**

:::{#posts}
:::
